Wildlife
Continents About

Africa

The cradle of wildlife, home to the planet's most iconic megafauna

Regions

Central Africa

East Africa

Kenya, Tanzania, Uganda

Savannas, grasslands, and the Serengeti

North Africa

Southern Africa

South Africa, Botswana, Zimbabwe

Kruger National Park, Okavango Delta

West Africa
